pi_items.source: export_result.sh defines EXPECTED_TITLE as 'Renewable Energy Deployment and Technologies' and queries the database for it.
verifier.py explicitly checks if 'Educational' is in the categories string.
setup_task.sh injects these exact three strings as section titles into the synthetically generated article_draft.txt.

setup_task.sh injects this exact YouTube URL into the synthetically generated article_draft.txt.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated article draft created at runtime. The expected post title 'Renewable Energy Deployment and Technologies' and category 'Educational' are explicitly enforced by the export script and verifier. The required headings ('Solar Energy Technologies', 'Wind Power Developments', 'Energy Storage Solutions'), quote text ('The transition to 100% renewable energy systems'), and YouTube URL ('https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1kUE0BZtTRc') are confirmed to be directly injected into the article_draft.txt file by the setup scripts.
